      "series_truncated": false,

      ]
    }
  },
  "run": {
    "build": {
      "cargo_profile_release_codegen_units": "",
      "cargo_profile_release_lto": "",
      "command": "export RUSTUP_HOME=/opt/rust CARGO_HOME=/opt/rust/cargo; cd /opt/rustscale && cargo build --release -p rustscale-bench -p rustscale-cli -p rustscale-rustscaled",
      "rustflags": ""
    },
    "cloud": {
      "disk_gb": 200,
      "disk_type": "pd-standard",
      "network": "default",
      "project": "tailscale-sandbox",
      "provider": "gcp",
      "requested_image_family": "ubuntu-2204-lts",
      "requested_image_project": "ubuntu-os-cloud",
      "requested_machine_type": "n2-standard-16"

  "run": {
    "build": {
      "cargo_profile_release_codegen_units": "",
      "cargo_profile_release_lto": "",
      "command": "export RUSTUP_HOME=/opt/rust CARGO_HOME=/opt/rust/cargo; cd /opt/rustscale && cargo build --release -p rustscale-bench -p rustscale-cli -p rustscale-rustscaled",
      "rustflags": ""
    },
    "cloud": {
      "disk_gb": 200,
      "disk_type": "pd-standard",
      "network": "default",
